textByHashes.6b9eae93ca9f6fe149b8b993693583b3f4d9919a: Grand job, what an obnoxious tree, spreading rumours 'bout other trees and sucking up all the water.
textByHashes.d7694ac57b559d4627e70a25a5daf6e10ee3a688: As a reward, I'll let ye use me full banking services!
textByHashes.33d0d972752fdadbed0efaf2c9b595f49dca9e31: What an obnoxious tree, spreading rumours 'bout other trees and sucking up all the water.
textByHashes.1cfd72c96b777526b9a6fef5f8ee1405159fb6f6: Since you're here, I'll let you use me restricted banking services.
textByHashes.0b61ff8c0756b71afe54ebdba59135222f678495: It be yer lucky day, Foresters!
textByHashes.79b46877e71740eb33aaf9d292000c528322bbee: Well, I must be getting on now.
